notes: Builds the divisor-pushforward dual δ = κ ∘ φ^* ∘ κ^{-1} (Silverman III.6.1b) CoordHom-free, using the σ-bridge `sigma_pullbackDivisor_kappaDivisor` to make the dual relation δ ∘ φ = [#ker φ] automatic. No `sorry` in the file; the two main public exports `divisorPushforwardDual` and `divisorPushforwardDual_comp` are used by `PencilDualDivisor.lean` and `OneSubProjOrdTransport.lean`, while `oneSubFrobeniusScaling_of_divisorDual` is consumed by `SeparableTransportBridge.lean`.
